description: Edge multi-mining fleet — 8 logical instances (16GB RAM / 128GB SSD profile) from Termux daemons.

notes.gpu_coins: PRL/ZANO/QTC/IRON run as edge supervisors on Termux; hash on H100/Akash fleet.
notes.grass: Android 3x multiplier — one lineup per instance with unique device_id.
notes.monero: Optional CPU mine in proot Ubuntu with xmrig when XMRIG_PATH is set.
